No matter the country. No matter the crime. The #GreenMachine will continue finding them.✅

He must have thought he was pretty fast in that black Corvette… But he wasn’t fast enough to evade the Green Machine.

This U.S. citizen attempted to run Border Patrol agents off the road in Chicago. He then fled, driving erratically, endangering public safety, and hitting at least two civilian vehicles.

Our agents with Operation Midway Blitz tracked him to a residence where he was arrested for 18 USC111 (Assault on a Federal Officer).

Any assault on federal law enforcement will not be tolerated. You will be identified, you will be arrested, and you will earn consequences for your violent actions.

❌This ain’t Grand Theft Auto. This is real life. We have real-life consequences.❌

During Operation Midway Blitz, a Venezuelan national illegally in the U.S. tried pulling a getaway move straight out of GTA… He dove into his van, threw it into reverse with all the doors open, crashed into a Border Patrol vehicle, and swerved toward a federal agent.

Luckily, agents moved fast, secured the illegal alien and the vehicle, and ended the escape attempt before anyone got hurt. 

This might work in GTA, but in real life, intentionally trying to run over agents is a WRONG move that comes with serious penalties.
